tldr: Move from Courier's notification routing API to CleverTap's mobile engagement platform with built-in analytics and segmentation.
why_switch: Need built-in analytics and behavioral segmentation alongside messaging
Want native mobile SDKs with retention dashboards out of the box
Prefer a single platform for engagement + analytics rather than stitching tools
Looking for stronger in-app messaging templates and campaign UI
what_to_export: Templates per channel (email, push, SMS, in-app)
User profiles, identifiers, and channel tokens
export_method: Pull users, profiles, preferences, templates, and lists from the Courier API and store as JSON. Verify endpoints in Courier's official API docs. There is no native bulk export, so script per-resource pulls with pagination.
import_method: Integrate the CleverTap SDKs into your apps to capture users and events, then upload historical user attributes via CleverTap's REST API. Recreate templates and campaigns in the CleverTap dashboard. Confirm exact endpoint names and payload shapes in CleverTap's official documentation before automating.

concept_mapping.note: Map identity and channel tokens; CleverTap uses Identity + Device IDs
Templates are tied to campaigns in CleverTap; rebuild content
Multi-channel fallback logic must be redesigned in Journeys
Behavioral data should go to Events for segmentation
Static lists vs dynamic segments — choose intent first
Recreate styles inline in CleverTap templates

gotchas: Lock-in increases — CleverTap stores rich behavioral data that is harder to extract later
Push tokens must be re-registered via CleverTap SDK; you cannot transfer APNs/FCM tokens directly
Pricing jumps from freemium to subscription starting at $75 — re-budget early
Identity unification rules differ; plan how anonymous-to-known merges should behave
Preference management is platform-specific; recheck unsubscribe and compliance flows
Run dual-send during cutover to confirm deliverability before turning Courier off

email.subject: Migrating from Courier to CleverTap
email.body:
Hi team,

We're moving notifications from Courier to CleverTap to consolidate engagement and analytics on one platform.

Plan:
- Export users, templates, preferences, and routing config from Courier
- Integrate CleverTap SDKs and start capturing live events
- Upload historical attributes via CleverTap's API
- Rebuild campaigns and journeys in CleverTap
- Dual-send for a short window, then cut over

Effort: roughly 20-60 hours. Detailed checklist to follow.

Thanks
